scan.title: Discover Devices
scan.instructionsTitle: Put your plug in pairing mode
scan.instructionsBody: Press and hold the device button for 5 seconds until the LED blinks twice, stays on for 1 second, and repeats.
scan.noBleDevices: No BLE smart plug found yet. Keep your phone close and try scanning again.
scan.noDevicesHint: Make sure your device is powered on and in setup mode
scan.timeoutHint: Move closer to the device and try again
scan.permissionReason: Smartera needs location permission to discover nearby WiFi devices. Your location is not tracked.
scan.permissionSettingsHint: Smartera needs location permission to scan for devices. Please enable it in Settings > Apps > Smartera > Permissions.
scan.enableWifi: Please enable WiFi to scan for devices

connect.title: Connect to Device
connect.connectionFailedHint: Please check your WiFi password and try again
connect.weakSignalHint: Move the device closer to your router
connect.noDeviceText: Please select a device from the scan screen first.

success.title: Device Added Successfully!
success.subtitle: Your device is ready to use

error.title: Setup Failed
error.retryHint: Please try again. If the problem persists, restart your device.
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
error.scanFailed: Could not scan for devices. Please check your WiFi and try again.
error.bleFailedMsg: Could not connect to the smart plug over Bluetooth. Move closer and retry.
error.bleTimeoutMsg: Bluetooth connection took too long. Please retry pairing.
error.apFailedMsg: Could not connect to the device access point. Please try again.
error.apTimeoutMsg: The device did not respond in time. Please try again.
error.credInvalidMsg: The device rejected the WiFi credentials. Please check and try again.
error.signalWeakMsg: The WiFi signal is too weak. Move the device closer to your router.
error.cloudFailed: The plug connected to WiFi but cloud registration could not be confirmed.
error.cloudTimeout: Cloud registration timed out. Please keep the plug powered and retry.

web.title: Add Device via Web
web.serialHint: Find this on the device or its packaging
web.pendingHint: Power on your device. It will automatically connect using these credentials.
